tracks.meaning: a group of students taught together, or a course of instruction in a particular subject
a social group or stratum of society distinguished by economic or cultural status
a taxonomic group ranking below phylum and above order in biological classification
a category or type in object-oriented programming that defines properties and methods for creating objects
a group of actors or performers who work together as a theatrical company
a legal category or division, such as a class of shares or a class action lawsuit
a category of military rank, ship, or weapon classified by size, power, or function
elegance, style, or high quality; sophistication or dignity
to assign something or someone to a particular category or rank
a grade or standard of quality or excellence used for classification
